notes: This is a clear, simple architecture diagram and almost every model produced highly accurate, essentially equivalent descriptions. All 15 models correctly identified the 7 components, both protocols (HTTPS, gRPC), the left-to-right flow with branching, and the color scheme. None of the 15 models mentioned the notable 'dangling third line' from the gRPC split described in the ground truth - this is the only meaningful differentiator and is a minor detail. gemma4-e4b|think ranks last due to a shape error (described Postgres/Redis as 'rectangular boxes' when they are ovals). gemma4-31b|think includes a questionable 'monospaced font' claim. qwen3.5-4b|nothink includes an unverified 'black border at top and bottom' detail. The top tier (gemma4-12b, qwen3-vl-8b, glm-4.6v-flash-9b, qwen3.5-9b, qwen3.6-27b) produced the most complete, well-organized descriptions with verbatim text, accurate shapes, and no hallucinated details. Differences between the top 10 are minimal and could easily re-order on re-judging.
